unresolved_mechanisms_labeled: Whether the turbopump is actually flightworthy after the 8% pressure spike for 40ms is an unresolved physical question that cannot be settled by assertion.
Whether range safety officer will approve the mission given unresolved hardware concern is unknown.
Whether noor_launch_director and kenji_chief_engineer will reach unanimous decision to proceed is unknown.

turbopump_discharge_pressure_anomaly_eff.description: An 8% pressure spike for 40ms may indicate hardware damage or degradation affecting flight safety.

launch_window_constraint.description: Mission must launch within the 30-day window starting 2023-11-14 and ending 2023-12-14.
